extract: Mewtwo (Japanese: ミュウツー Mewtwo) is a Psychic-type Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation I. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Mewtwo can Mega Evolve into two different forms: Mega Mewtwo X using the Mewtwonite X. Mega Mewtwo Y using the Mewtwonite Y. Mewtwo is a clone of Mew, which it is associated with, and they are thus collectively referred to as the Mew duo by fans. It is the last Pokémon in the Mountain Kalos Pokédex and Lumiose Pokédex.
